stories.description: Replace raw fetch() in financialService.ts â€” convert all 20 functions to use api.get/post/patch/delete helpers from services/api.ts which auto-inject auth via getIdTokenAsync()

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: grep -c fetch( services/financialService.ts returns 0 â€” all raw fetch() calls replaced with api.* helpers
Frontend tests pass with no regressions after conversion

stories.description: Replace raw fetch() in storageService.ts â€” convert 4 functions (getDispatchEvents, getTimeLogs, logTime, logDispatchEvent) to api.* helpers. Remove duplicate 401/403 checks.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: grep -c fetch( services/storageService.ts returns 0 â€” all raw fetch() calls replaced
Duplicate auth checks at lines 259, 294 removed

stories.description: Add auth readiness gate in App.tsx â€” add isAuthReady state, set true AFTER refreshData() completes in onUserChange callback, gate render so children mount only after token confirmed. Reset on logout.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: isAuthReady state added â€” children render blocked until refreshData() completes
Login produces no 401 console errors â€” children mount only after auth ready
Logout resets isAuthReady to false

stories.description: Create useCurrentUser() reactive hook subscribing to onUserChange() from authService. Replace synchronous getCurrentUser() calls in LoadDetailView.tsx, LoadList.tsx, Settlements.tsx.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: useCurrentUser hook subscribes to onUserChange and returns reactive user state
Consumer components re-render on auth state change without null-user crashes

stories.description: Add 401 token refresh + single retry in api.ts. On first 401, force-refresh token via auth.currentUser?.getIdToken(true), retry once with fresh token. Only dispatch auth:session-expired if retry also returns 401.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: On first 401, token is force-refreshed and request retried once
If retry succeeds with fresh token, no auth:session-expired event dispatched
If retry also returns 401, auth:session-expired event dispatched and error thrown

stories.description: Fix schema conflicts + update migration runner. Part A: Remove 5 duplicate CREATE TABLEs from 001_baseline.sql (quotes, leads, bookings, messages, work_items â€” authoritative versions in 017/018/019). Remove ALTER TABLE messages from 003_operational_entities.sql. Part B: Update MIGRATION_ORDER in docker-mysql.ts to include all migrations through 032. Part C: Document dev DB reset instructions.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: 5 duplicate CREATE TABLE statements removed from 001_baseline.sql (quotes, leads, bookings, messages, work_items)
ALTER TABLE messages ADD COLUMN company_id removed from 003_operational_entities.sql
MIGRATION_ORDER array in docker-mysql.ts updated to include all migrations through 032
Server tests pass with clean migration order

stories.description: Create migration 032 â€” parties subsystem. 8 new tables: parties, party_contacts, party_documents, rate_rows, rate_tiers, constraint_sets, constraint_rules, party_catalog_links. All with company_id index for tenant isolation. Schema sourced from server/routes/clients.ts lines 283-600.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Migration 032 creates all 8 party tables with correct columns and FK constraints
GET /api/providers returns 200 (empty array) after migration
GET /api/contacts returns 200 (empty array) after migration

stories.description: Company record creation in signup. Signup currently creates company in Firestore only, not MySQL. Add MySQL INSERT INTO companies in signup handler. Ensure company_id foreign keys are satisfied.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Signup handler creates company record in MySQL in addition to Firestore
GET /api/companies/{id} returns 200 after signup â€” no more 404

stories.description: Fix dashboard_card + missing routes. Fix GET /api/dashboard/cards 500 (company_id query), fix GET /api/dispatch/events 404 (frontend calls wrong path), fix GET /api/equipment 404 (requires companyId param). Add route aliases or fix frontend paths.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: GET /api/dashboard/cards returns 200 with valid auth â€” no more 500
Dispatch events route accessible from frontend path â€” no more 404
Equipment route accessible with tenant-scoped path â€” no more 404

stories.description: Fix 403 permission errors (26 errors). Two sources: A) Tenant mismatch from missing company record (resolved by S-2.3). B) Role-based access â€” correct behavior for driver role. Verify 403 count drops from 26 to <5 after S-2.3 fix. Ensure frontend hides role-gated buttons for insufficient roles.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: 403 error count drops from 26 to less than 5 after tenant mismatch fix
Remaining 403s are legitimate role-based access denials

stories.description: Fix 400 malformed request errors (21 errors). Add client-side validation for: AI routes (missing imageBase64), Safety routes (missing required fields), dispatch events (JSON.stringify failures), equipment PATCH (invalid field names), Zod schema mismatches, weather/document (missing coordinates). Guard API calls behind validation checks.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: 400 error count drops from 21 to less than 3 after client-side validation added
AI route calls guarded by if (!imageBase64) return check

stories.description: AccountingPortal full remediation â€” remove 10 hardcoded values ("14" pending docs, "$2,840" IFTA, 3 automation rule objects, setTimeout mock matching, glAccountId "5000", 4 audit log entries, "1 hour ago", "42.5 hrs", "14" active triggers) and wire 3 buttons (View All Loadsâ†’navigate('/loads'), Create New Ruleâ†’toast, More optionsâ†’toast). stories.description: IntelligenceHub full remediation â€” remove 8 mock values (CS-9901 call session, "888-555-0000", "800-SAFE-KCI", "45-60 mins" ETA, "John Doe" stats, "Trucker Tom", mockCallers array) and add Reports tab showing call metrics (count, avg duration) and interaction summary (calls vs messages count). stories.description: Settlements full remediation â€” wire chevron expand toggle (setExpandedRow), wire Batch Print to generate PDF via jsPDF, wire Finalize to PATCH /api/settlements/batch endpoint (add if absent), add Export CSV button. Remove all mock showFeedback-only operations.

stories.description: Remove remaining hardcoded values â€” ExceptionConsole: compute SLA countdown from ex.slaDueAt, compute elapsed time from ex.createdAt, compute avg resolution from resolved exceptions. LoadGantt: use load.pickupTime and load.estimatedDeliveryTime instead of "04:00 AM"/"ETA: 06:30 PM". QuoteManager: use selectedQuote.customerName/Phone instead of "Acme Global"/"3125550199". NetworkPortal: replace "NEW CONTACT"/"PENDING@MAIL.COM"/"000-000-000" with empty strings. AccountingView: change misleading "Mocking" comment to "Compute".

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: ExceptionConsole 3 hardcoded values replaced with dynamic computations from exception data
LoadGantt uses load.pickupTime and load.estimatedDeliveryTime â€” no hardcoded times
QuoteManager uses selectedQuote data â€” no hardcoded customer names or phone numbers
NetworkPortal uses empty string defaults â€” no fake placeholder data
AccountingView misleading 'Mocking' comment changed to accurately describe computation

stories.description: Wire 10 LoadDetailView buttons. REAL implementations: Print BOL (jsPDF generation), Load Stops (scroll to stops section), Documents (fetch from /api/documents?loadId=), Audit Logs (navigate to /activity-log?loadId=), Tag for Action (PATCH loads with flagged:true), Lock/Unlock (PATCH loads with locked toggle), +Add Pickup (add stop form with type=pickup), +Add Drop (add stop form with type=dropoff). TOAST implementations: Carrier Rates ("Rate card coming soon"), Show Route ("Requires Google Maps API key").

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: 8 REAL buttons call APIs or navigate â€” Print BOL, Load Stops, Documents, Audit Logs, Tag, Lock, +Pickup, +Drop
2 TOAST buttons show visible notification â€” Carrier Rates and Show Route
Zero silent no-ops remain in LoadDetailView â€” every button produces visible result

stories.description: Add 3 recharts visualizations to Dashboard. BarChart: RPM by day (last 7 days from loads prop). LineChart: Exception count by day (last 7 days from exceptions prop). BarChart: Revenue vs Cost by week (from loads carrierRate vs customerRate). All charts use existing props. Empty state placeholder when no data.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: 3 recharts components render in Dashboard (BarChart RPM, LineChart exceptions, BarChart revenue)
Chart data computed from existing props â€” zero hardcoded chart data
Empty state 'No data for this period' shown when no loads/exceptions exist

stories.description: Fix +New button z-index on Load Board. Sidebar toggle uses z-20, bottom panel uses z-30. Adjust z-index hierarchy so +New button is always clickable.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: +New button is clickable and not obscured by other z-index layers â€” opens new load form or navigates

stories.description: Add charts + drill-down to AnalyticsDashboard. Add recharts BarChart for broker RPM comparison. Add recharts PieChart for lane revenue distribution. Add click handlers on broker/lane cards for drill-down navigation.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: At least 2 recharts components render in AnalyticsDashboard (BarChart and PieChart)
Click on broker/lane card navigates to filtered view (drill-down)

stories.description: Fix CalendarView multi-day load visualization. Currently loads only show on pickup day (pickupDate === formatDateKey(date)). Render loads across the full date range (pickupDate through deliveryDate). Show duration span or indicator on each active day.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Multi-day loads appear on all days between pickup and delivery dates, not just pickup day

stories.description: Complete CommandCenter incident detail drawer. Timeline array exists but isn't rendered visually. Render selectedIncident.timeline as a vertical timeline component showing action, actor, timestamp for each entry.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Incident timeline renders as vertical timeline in detail drawer
Each timeline entry shows action, actor, and timestamp
